task-registry.task: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, index.html, src/main.ts booting a styled title bar
Install iconify-icon + @iconify-json/game-icons, prove one icon renders
src/types.ts: Entity, CombatStats, Rune, Spell, Room, Floor types
src/content/runes.ts and spells.ts: 5 runes, starter spells, combo recipes, ingenuity folding
src/content/enemies.ts: 6+ enemies incl. Stone Warden, Mirror Djinn, Pyre Lich, slimes, wraiths, bandit
src/content/floors.ts: floor 1 (7 rooms + boss), floor 2 (6 rooms + boss), authored graph
src/state.ts: GameState, load/save via localStorage, newGame() initializer
src/scenes/router.ts: scene enum + render dispatcher, CSS base theme
src/scenes/title.ts: title screen with "New Game" and "Continue"
src/ui/hud.ts: persistent HUD (HP bar, mana bar, floor, tick, crystals, Traits label)
src/scenes/room.ts: room view with type icon, themed panel, exit buttons, fog reveal
Navigation tick: save on entry, respawn logic, boss gate check
src/combat.ts: turn resolver, damage calc, type/resist handling
src/scenes/combat.ts: Fight/Spells/Bag/Run UI with HP bars, enemy iconify sprite, log
Victory/defeat flow: XP, crystals, return to room or game over
src/forge.ts: combo table + ingenuity folding recipe, affinity tracking
src/scenes/forge.ts: rune selection, preview, craft, affinity display, equip
Wire floor 1 Stone Warden elite + boss; verify starter spells inefficient
Wire floor 2 Mirror Djinn elite + Pyre Lich boss; new constraint
src/scenes/event.ts: NPC portrait, text, 2+ choices, effect application
src/ui/overlays.ts: Map, Spellbook, Traits overlay toggles from HUD
CONVENTIONS.md + ARCHITECTURE.md
Full-playthrough smoke test, fix any softlocks
Production build, VERIFICATION.md with 4 gates
